testcase.name: contextLoads

connection conn0: url=jdbc:h2:mem:interviewdb user=SA 2026-06-01T21:57:31.648+05:30 INFO 2564 --- [ai-interview-platform] [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource : HikariPool-1 - Start completed. 2026-06-01T21:57:31.949+05:30 INFO 2564 --- [ai-interview-platform] [ main] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: create table company_profiles ( id bigint generated by default as identity, name varchar(255) not null, prompt_injection TEXT not null, slug varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table interview_responses ( id bigint generated by default as identity, confidence_score integer not null, emotion_vector varchar(255) not null check (emotion_vector in ('PROFESSIONAL','ANXIOUS','ENTHUSIASTIC','NEUTRAL')), filler_word_count integer not null, transcript TEXT, question_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table interview_sessions ( id bigint generated by default as identity, company varchar(255) not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, status varchar(255) not null check (status in ('INITIALIZED','ACTIVE','COMPLETED')), target_role varchar(255) not null, job_id bigint, user_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table jobs ( id bigint generated by default as identity, company_name varchar(255) not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, description varchar(2000) not null, skills_required varchar(255) not null, title varchar(255) not null, type varchar(255) not null, recruiter_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table performance_reports ( id bigint generated by default as identity, overall_score integer not null, skill_breakdown TEXT, suggestions TEXT, interview_session_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table questions ( id bigint generated by default as identity, content varchar(2000) not null, order_index integer not null, type varchar(255) not null check (type in ('BEHAVIORAL','TECHNICAL')), interview_session_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table users ( id bigint generated by default as identity, email varchar(255) not null, password_hash varchar(255) not null, role varchar(255) not null check (role in ('CANDIDATE','COMPANY','ADMIN')), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: alter table if exists company_profiles drop constraint if exists UK_keoe2fkoov2ayipqqn1sso796 Hibernate: alter table if exists company_profiles add constraint
